title: Built on a Decade of Engineering Excellence
p1: For over a decade, we have continuously refined our biometric hardware manufacturing processes — not as traders, but as engineers working on the production line. Corevein Connect is a new international brand that builds on this tradition and focuses specifically on palm vein biometrics and smart payment solutions.
p2: Our production facility in Shenzhen features dedicated production lines for manufacturing biometric modules, POS terminals, and access control systems. Every product that leaves our factory embodies our unwavering commitment to precision engineering and rigorous quality control. We welcome factory audits.
